age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be provided as per GOI instructions for SC/ST/OBC/PH.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS / BVSc / BDS with three years' post qualification experience, MBBS / BVSc / BDS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MVSc./ MDS/MPH) or any equivalent degree, including integrated PG degrees, MBBS/BVSc/ BDS with PhD
qualification.details: MBBS / BVSc / BDS with three years' post qualification experience. MBBS / BVSc / BDS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MVSc./ MDS/MPH) or any equivalent degree, including integrated PG degrees. MBBS/BVSc/ BDS with PhD

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS New Delhi Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS New Delhi Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the AIIMS New Delhi Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) position is 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) post at AIIMS New Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The required qualifications include MBBS/BVSc/BDS with three years' experience, or a Post Graduate Degree, or a PhD in the relevant field.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) role?
faq.answer: The salary for this contractual role ranges from Rs. 80,000 to Rs. 1,04,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete application via email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS New Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS New Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position at AIIMS New Delhi.
